title: Christopher Luxon meets with China's Xi Jinping
description: The Prime Minister has met China's leader on the sidelines of the APEC Summit.
keywords: Radio New Zealand, RNZ, Public Radio, News, Current Affairs, Audio, Podcasts
snippet:
Christopher Luxon has been warmly welcomed by China's President in Lima on the sidelines of the APEC Summit.

It is the first time Xi Jinping and Luxon have met...
